title: Atlas — Multi-Agent Research System
desc: Orchestrates specialized research and synthesis agents, each with a narrow scope, to turn broad research questions into cited, structured reports — reducing analyst research time significantly.
impact: Planner agent → parallel researcher agents → critic agent → synthesis, with a shared vector store for grounding.

title: Ledger — Enterprise Knowledge Assistant
desc: An internal assistant that answers employee questions from scattered internal documentation, with source citations on every answer and role-based access to sensitive material.
impact: Cut average time-to-answer for internal support questions from hours to under a minute.

title: Flowline — Automation Suite
desc: A set of custom n8n nodes and workflows connecting CRM, email, and AI reasoning steps to automate lead qualification and follow-up for a small sales team.
impact: Automated a manual, multi-tool daily task down to a single triggered workflow.
